# wowo Project - Auto Generated File
# Language: Python (User Preference)
# Created for: test.txt generation request

def auto_generate_message():
    """自動生成問候訊息"""
    return "Hello! This file was auto-generated for you."

def show_user_preference():
    """顯示使用者偏好設定"""
    preference = "Python"
    return f"User favorite language: {preference}"

def main():
    print("=" * 40)
    print(auto_generate_message())
    print(show_user_preference())
    print("=" * 40)
    print("Status: File successfully created!")
    print("Content: Auto-generated Python template")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
